mnemonics.title: Characteristics of Ether
mnemonics.content: DDLS - Decentralized, Digital, Limited supply, Divisible

mnemonics.title: Uses of Ether
mnemonics.content: TCS - Transaction fees, Computational services, Storage

mnemonics.title: Gas and Ether
mnemonics.content: GASE - Gas is a unit of measurement, Affects transaction priority, Secures the network, Executes smart contracts

mnemonics.title: Smart Contracts and Ether
mnemonics.content: SPACE - Smart contracts use Ether to Pay for execution, Access decentralized applications, Compute data, Execute transactions
